# QA Plan: Sprint 13 — Offline-experience endcap + audio decision + overlay polish

**Date**: 2026-05-13
**Generated by**: /qa-plan (real-time, sprint-driven — Sprint 13 nominal window 2026-05-13 → 2026-05-22)
**Scope**: 12 stories across 7 systems (Economy / OfflineProgressionEngine / SceneManager / HeroRoster / Recruitment / AudioRouter / overlay-system)
**Engine**: Godot 4.6
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-13.md`

---

## Context

Sprint 13 is the first real-time-authored sprint after the Sprint 21 pre-emptive cadence retirement. Must Have items map directly to playtest-05 findings (`production/playtests/playtest-05-sprint-12-2026-05-12.md`):

- **S13-M2** — Return-to-App modal: offline_rewards_collected fires correctly (per S12-M5) but no UI subscribes; player who returns from offline sees no summary
- **S13-M3** — Story 016 AC-9 close-reload smoke: deferred from playtest-05; the real save-persist round-trip never validated in a live build
- **S13-M4** — Hero Detail overlay: 8-line placeholder; playtester wants to inspect heroes
- **S13-M1** — Audio sourcing: AudioRouter wired but plays silence; needs decision (silent-MVP vs. commission vs. license)

This plan prioritizes **integration tests** for the new modal wiring + a **manual playtest gate** for AC-9. Audio sourcing is config-only (the dispatch path is already tested); HeroLeveling XP curve is a Logic story with clear formula acceptance.

## Automated Tests Required

### S13-M2 — Return-to-App Screen wire-up — Integration

**Test file**: `tests/integration/return_to_app/return_to_app_screen_test.gd` (extend existing contract test from Sprint 16 scaffold)

**What to test**:
- Modal renders within 2 frames of `OfflineProgressionEngine.offline_rewards_collected` emission
- All 4 OfflineSummary fields populate correctly: `gold_earned`, `kills_by_tier`, `floors_cleared_in_window`, `hero_levels_gained`
- Acknowledge button (or tap-to-continue surface) dismisses the modal via `SceneManager.hide_modal`
- Post-dismiss routes back to `guild_hall` via CROSS_FADE
- Signal subscription is wired ONCE (no double-fire on hot-reload or screen re-enter)
- SceneManager state transitions through PAUSED → IDLE per Story 009 contract during the modal lifecycle

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `offline_rewards_collected` fires with zero rewards (all fields = 0) — modal should still render gracefully OR not render at all (design decision in S13-M1 / UX pass)
- `offline_rewards_collected` fires while another modal is active — show_modal stacking behavior per ADR-0007
- Signal fires before screen's `_ready` completes (race condition: modal queued via SceneManager) — should queue + render once ready
- Tap-to-continue triggered before signal arrival — should be a no-op or display "no rewards" state

**Estimated test count**: ~6-8 integration tests

---

### S13-M4 — Hero Detail overlay real content — UI + Integration

**Test file**: extend `tests/integration/hero_detail/hero_detail_modal_contract_test.gd` (existing contract test from Sprint 16 scaffold)

**What to test**:
- Tapping a hero card in formation_assignment opens the Hero Detail modal via `SceneManager.push_overlay("hero_detail", false)`
- Modal reads HeroInstance state (instance_id, class_id, display_name, current_level, xp) on entry
- Modal renders class display_name from `HeroClassDatabase.get_class(class_id).display_name`
- Modal renders computed stats: attack/HP/speed at current_level via `HeroClass.stat_at_level()`
- Close button (or tap-outside, depending on UX) dismisses via `SceneManager.pop_overlay`
- Stale HeroInstance (e.g., hero removed mid-modal-lifetime) handled gracefully — modal closes itself on `hero_removed` signal

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Hero at level 1 (entry state, base stats)
- Hero at level cap (per HeroClass.LEVEL_CAP = 15 from `stat_at_level_test.gd`)
- Hero with class_id that's resolvable in DataRegistry vs. unresolvable (push_warning fallback)
- Prestige V1.0 hero (if `prestige_index` > 0, display additional metadata per `prestige-system.md`)

**Estimated test count**: ~5-7 integration tests

---

### S13-S1 — OE Story 10 E2E budget verification test — Logic (perf)

**Test file**: `tests/integration/offline_progression_engine/end_to_end_offline_replay_test.gd` (extend existing — already has scaffold per playtest-05 reference)

**What to test**:
- E2E flow: cold launch with synthetic `offline_elapsed_seconds` → chunked replay completes → OfflineSummary populates → `offline_rewards_collected` fires → screen routing occurs
- **AC-OE-13 (BLOCKING)**: per-chunk wall-clock time stays under 16ms (verified via `summary.total_replay_wall_time_ms / summary.chunks_consumed` proxy)
- **AC-OE-12 (ADVISORY)**: total replay wall-time stays under 5000ms for an 8h cap-clipped session (soft-warn on dev hardware; min-spec mobile validation is post-launch profiling)
- Replay completion populates all OfflineSummary fields per `offline-progression-engine.md` §C.1

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Zero elapsed (cold-launch with last_active_unix_time == current_time): no replay, no summary, signal does NOT fire
- Cap-clipped (elapsed > 8h): replay runs for cap duration only, `cap_reached(seconds_clipped)` signal fires
- Re-entrant `run_offline_replay` during in-flight replay: dropped with push_warning per AC-OE-10

**Estimated test count**: ~3-4 perf-flavored integration tests (the bulk of OE coverage already exists from S12-M5)

---

### S13-S2 — Settings overlay real content — UI + Integration

**Test file**: NEW — `tests/integration/settings/settings_overlay_test.gd`

**What to test**:
- Gear icon on Guild Hall opens the Settings overlay via `SceneManager.push_overlay("settings")`
- Volume sliders (Master/Music/SFX) write to AudioRouter via its volume API; verify via `AudioServer.get_bus_volume_db()`
- reduce_motion toggle writes to `user://settings.cfg` via SceneManager's `_settings_cfg_path` (use test override per `feedback_test_isolation_user_configfile`)
- Close button dismisses via `SceneManager.pop_overlay`
- Settings persist across overlay reopen (within session) AND across save-load cycles (full round-trip)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Slider at 0% (mute) — bus volume should reach silent floor without crashing
- Slider at 100% — no clipping at the AudioServer level
- reduce_motion toggled mid-tween (during a scene transition) — current-tween behavior is unchanged; next tween applies new clamp

**Estimated test count**: ~5-6 integration tests

---

### S13-S3 — HeroLeveling real XP curve — Logic

**Test file**: NEW — `tests/unit/hero_roster/add_xp_curve_test.gd` (extend the existing `add_xp_test.gd` if appropriate)

**What to test**:
- Per-class XP curve formula from `hero-class-database.md` correctly computes xp_to_next_level for each class+level
- `add_xp(amount)` increments xp; level-up triggers when xp crosses threshold
- Multi-level-up on single add_xp call (large amount): correctly cascades through multiple levels in one call
- `hero_leveled` signal fires with correct payload (new_level field included)
- Level cap (15 per `stat_at_level_test.gd`): xp past cap is clamped or discarded per GDD; no over-leveling
- Curve is data-driven from HeroClassDatabase, NOT hardcoded

**Edge cases to cover**:
- xp = 0 add (no-op)
- xp negative (push_error; no mutation)
- xp at exactly threshold (clean level-up; no off-by-one)
- xp at level cap (no further level-ups; xp accumulates or discards per GDD)
- Multi-level jump (e.g., xp = 100k to a level-1 hero crosses multiple thresholds in one call)

**Estimated test count**: ~8-10 unit tests

---

### S13-N3 — Recruit pool refresh on first_launch boundary — Logic (gated on playtest-06)

**Test file**: NEW (if implemented) — `tests/unit/recruitment/first_launch_refresh_test.gd`

**What to test**:
- On `SaveLoadSystem.first_launch`: pool is regenerated via `_regenerate_pool` per ADR-0015
- On returning-launch (save exists): pool is NOT auto-regenerated; respects persisted `_current_pool`
- Daily-reset boundary semantics — TBD based on ADR-0015 OQ-0015-1 outcome

**Estimated test count**: ~3-4 unit tests (only if implemented; gated on playtest-06 signal)

## Manual QA Checklist

### S13-M2 — Return-to-App Screen — Manual walkthrough

**Verification method**: Real Godot build session (or Editor F5)
**Who must sign off**: producer + qa-tester
**Evidence to capture**: Video clip OR written notes in playtest-06 / playtest-07 report

Checklist:
- [ ] Launch fresh build (or close + reopen after waiting / system-time-warping)
- [ ] On reopen with elapsed ≥1 minute, Return-to-App modal appears
- [ ] Modal renders kill_count, gold_earned, hero_levels_gained, floors_cleared fields correctly populated
- [ ] Modal uses parchment theme (matches Guild Hall aesthetic)
- [ ] Acknowledge / tap-to-continue dismisses the modal
- [ ] Post-dismiss, player is on guild_hall with updated gold counter
- [ ] No `push_error` lines in Output panel
- [ ] Modal does NOT render on cold-launch (no save file → first_launch path → no offline window)

### S13-M3 — Story 016 AC-9 close-reload smoke — Playtest gate

**Verification method**: Real Godot build session
**Who must sign off**: producer + qa-tester
**Evidence to capture**: `production/playtests/playtest-06-ac9-close-reload-2026-05-??.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Launch fresh build
- [ ] Dispatch Theron solo → clear Forest Reach floor 1
- [ ] Note: hero levels, gold balance, floor unlock state, formation contents
- [ ] Force-quit the game (Cmd-Q / Alt-F4)
- [ ] Reopen the game
- [ ] **Verify**: hero levels match pre-quit state
- [ ] **Verify**: gold balance matches pre-quit state (modulo offline replay if elapsed > 1min)
- [ ] **Verify**: forest_reach floor 1 still cleared (FloorUnlock state preserved)
- [ ] **Verify**: formation contents preserved (Theron in slot 0)
- [ ] **Verify**: no "save corrupt" modal pops up
- [ ] **Verify**: no error toast, no push_error in Output

### S13-M4 — Hero Detail overlay — Manual walkthrough

**Verification method**: Manual interaction in build
**Who must sign off**: ui-programmer + qa-tester
**Evidence to capture**: Screenshot of modal showing real hero data + close action

Checklist:
- [ ] Open formation_assignment screen
- [ ] Tap a hero card (Theron, or any recruited hero)
- [ ] Hero Detail modal opens with parchment theme + dim backdrop
- [ ] Modal shows: hero display_name, class display_name, current_level, attack/HP/speed stats
- [ ] Stats reflect HeroClass.stat_at_level() values (cross-check against known formula)
- [ ] Close button dismisses the modal cleanly
- [ ] After close, formation_assignment is interactive again (no stuck modal)
- [ ] If hero is at level cap (lvl 15), display indicates max level

### S13-S2 — Settings overlay — Manual walkthrough

**Verification method**: Manual interaction in build (after S13-M1 audio decision)
**Who must sign off**: ui-programmer + audio-director + accessibility-specialist
**Evidence to capture**: Screenshot + audio-changed evidence (if non-silent audio)

Checklist:
- [ ] Tap gear icon on Guild Hall
- [ ] Settings overlay opens with parchment theme
- [ ] 3 volume sliders visible: Master, Music, SFX
- [ ] Drag Master to 0% → audio fades to silent (if non-silent build)
- [ ] Drag Master back to 100% → audio returns
- [ ] Toggle reduce_motion ON → next scene transition is instant-cut (or clamp ≤50ms)
- [ ] Close button dismisses overlay
- [ ] Reopen Settings → previous values persist (within session)
- [ ] Quit + reopen → settings still persist (cross-launch via user://settings.cfg)

### S13-N1 — Audio asset sourcing (non-silent branch only) — Audibility check

**Verification method**: Audio playback session
**Who must sign off**: audio-director + creative-director
**Evidence to capture**: Video clip with audio capturing the cozy register cues

Checklist (when implemented):
- [ ] UI tap chime audibly plays on button presses
- [ ] enemy_killed plays tier-pitched kill chime (per F.1 formula)
- [ ] boss_killed plays stinger; music ducks during stinger (per F.3)
- [ ] floor_cleared_first_time plays fanfare
- [ ] hero_leveled plays level-up chime
- [ ] gold_changed plays coin chime (throttled to ≤4/s per F.2)
- [ ] Music crossfade between Guild Hall ↔ Forest Reach beds is perceptually smooth
- [ ] Volume API persists across launches

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before Sprint 13 QA hand-off:

1. ✓ Game launches to main menu / guild_hall without crash — regression check (Sprint 12 baseline)
2. ✓ **Recruit flow** still works — `recruitment_try_recruit_test.gd`
3. ✓ **Offline progression replay** still chunks correctly — `offline_batch_chunking_test.gd`
4. ✓ **Save / load round trip** still passes — `save_persist_roundtrip_test.gd`
5. **Return-to-App modal renders on offline_rewards_collected** — NEW for Sprint 13 (S13-M2)
6. **Hero Detail modal opens from formation_assignment** — NEW for Sprint 13 (S13-M4)
7. **Settings overlay opens + persists** — NEW for Sprint 13 (S13-S2)
8. **HeroLeveling XP curve crosses thresholds correctly** — NEW for Sprint 13 (S13-S3)
9. ⏳ **AC-9 close-reload smoke** — manual gate (S13-M3)

**Smoke verification target**: ≥2075 tests passing (2058 baseline + estimated +17 new tests from M2/M4 + S1/S2/S3).

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|---------------|--------------|---------------------|
| S13-M3 (AC-9 close-reload) | Validate save-persist survives a real quit/reopen cycle in a live build | 1 | Solo dev (project lead) |
| S13-M2 (Return-to-App) | Verify the cozy summary modal feels right at first encounter — fields ordered intelligibly, dismissal feels natural | 1 | Fresh-eyes tester OR solo |
| S13-N1 (Audio audibility, if non-silent decision) | Verify cues land at the right moments + don't overlap into noise | 1 | Audio-director + solo |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes for each session must be written under `production/playtests/playtest-XX-<scope>-<date>.md` and reviewed by producer + qa-tester before the corresponding story is marked COMPLETE via `/story-done`.

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 13

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories (M2, M4, S1, S2, S3, N3 if shipped)
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for UI stories (M2 walkthrough, M4 screenshot, S2 walkthrough) + playtest gate (M3 playtest-06 report)
- [ ] Smoke check passes — full test suite green at sprint close
- [ ] No regressions in the 9 playtest-05 fixes shipped in v0.0.0.9
- [ ] No regressions in the save-persist round-trip (Sprint 11 invariant)
- [ ] Code reviewed inline (Solo mode — no `/code-review` runs required)
- [ ] Story files updated to `Status: Complete` (where they exist) via `/story-done`
- [ ] ADR-0017 audio sourcing decision committed (S13-M1)
- [ ] Sprint 13 retrospective committed (S13-N4)

---

## Notes

- **Playtest-driven scope**: Must Have items map directly to playtest-05 findings. Sprint 14+ planning will be driven by playtest-06 + Sprint 13 retro signal, not autonomous output.
- **Sprint 14-21 archival** (S13-S4) is process work — no QA needed beyond verifying the directory move.
- **Solo review mode** — no `/team-qa` orchestration; QA execution is solo via `/smoke-check` + targeted playtests.
- **AC-OE-12 (5s ADVISORY)** verification on min-spec mobile is deferred to platform-cert hardware availability; CI assertion is dev-hardware-only and explicitly flagged ADVISORY.
- **Test framework**: GdUnit4 (per `coding-standards.md`); CI runner is `tests/gdunit4_runner.gd`; full sweep command: `/Applications/Godot_mono.app/Contents/MacOS/Godot --headless --script tests/gdunit4_runner.gd`.

**Last forward-looking QA plan precedent**: `production/qa/qa-plan-sprint-12-2026-05-12.md` (mixed retroactive/forward, captured the playtest-05 surface).
